policy.note: This guard validates runner and fixture reports only. It does not scan private roots or inspect source file contents.

findings.message: Runner report must exist.
Fixture smoke report must exist.
runner schema_version must be 0.1.
runner must be metadata-only.
runner must declare no file-content reads.
runner must not copy private content.
runner must not write public files.
runner public-ready after run must be 0.
runner pilots must be an array.
runner must contain all expected pilots.
runner pilot must be expected: villa-savoye.
runner pilot villa-savoye must stay review_only.
runner pilot villa-savoye must keep public_ready=false.
runner pilot villa-savoye fingerprints must be an array.
runner pilot must be expected: kapelle-sogn-benedetg.
runner pilot kapelle-sogn-benedetg must stay review_only.
runner pilot kapelle-sogn-benedetg must keep public_ready=false.
runner pilot kapelle-sogn-benedetg fingerprints must be an array.
runner pilot must be expected: alterszentrum-kloster-ingenbohl.
runner pilot alterszentrum-kloster-ingenbohl must stay review_only.
runner pilot alterszentrum-kloster-ingenbohl must keep public_ready=false.
runner pilot alterszentrum-kloster-ingenbohl fingerprints must be an array.
Runner status must be blocked or private-output-written.
Blocked runner must not scan a root.
Blocked runner must scan zero files.
Blocked runner must not write private inventory.
Blocked runner must include blocked_reason.
fixture schema_version must be 0.1.
fixture must be metadata-only.
fixture must declare no file-content reads.
fixture must not copy private content.
fixture must not write public files.
fixture public-ready after run must be 0.
fixture pilots must be an array.
fixture must contain all expected pilots.
fixture pilot must be expected: villa-savoye.
fixture pilot villa-savoye must stay review_only.
fixture pilot villa-savoye must keep public_ready=false.
fixture pilot villa-savoye fingerprints must be an array.
fixture fingerprint must include path_hash.
fixture fingerprint must not include raw path.
fixture fingerprint must not include content.
fixture fingerprint must include path_hash.
fixture fingerprint must not include raw path.
fixture fingerprint must not include content.
fixture pilot must be expected: kapelle-sogn-benedetg.
fixture pilot kapelle-sogn-benedetg must stay review_only.
fixture pilot kapelle-sogn-benedetg must keep public_ready=false.
fixture pilot kapelle-sogn-benedetg fingerprints must be an array.
fixture fingerprint must include path_hash.
fixture fingerprint must not include raw path.
fixture fingerprint must not include content.
fixture fingerprint must include path_hash.
fixture fingerprint must not include raw path.
fixture fingerprint must not include content.
fixture pilot must be expected: alterszentrum-kloster-ingenbohl.
fixture pilot alterszentrum-kloster-ingenbohl must stay review_only.
fixture pilot alterszentrum-kloster-ingenbohl must keep public_ready=false.
fixture pilot alterszentrum-kloster-ingenbohl fingerprints must be an array.
fixture fingerprint must include path_hash.
fixture fingerprint must not include raw path.
fixture fingerprint must not include content.
fixture fingerprint must include path_hash.
fixture fingerprint must not include raw path.
fixture fingerprint must not include content.
Fixture smoke must pass.
Fixture smoke must be public-safe mode.
Fixture smoke must exercise scan path.
Fixture smoke must scan at least six files.
Fixture smoke must produce at least six candidate matches.
Fixture smoke must not write private inventory output.
Fixture pilot villa-savoye must have at least two candidates.
Fixture pilot kapelle-sogn-benedetg must have at least two candidates.
Fixture pilot alterszentrum-kloster-ingenbohl must have at least two candidates.

next_actions: Keep private metadata inventory blocked until source-root activation passes.
Use fixture smoke as the public-safe regression test for scan-path changes.
After a real private metadata run, verify the private output with kosmo:private-inventory-output-check before handoff.
